p: This leaf page exercises a page with no children but many internal content classes. It links back to and sideways to .
Boundary text: zero children, one parent, many references. Date variants 2026-05-04, 04.05.2026, 2026/05/04; versions v0, v1, v1.2.3.

ac:rich-text-body.p: Inside the expandable body sit a broken leaf target , a sideways link to , and escaped XML <grandchild-expand>.

ol.li: First item with bold and italic.
Second item with subscript and superscript.
Third item with broken literal invalid-grandchild-link://value.

ac:rich-text-body.p: Grandchild note macro includes escaped XML text <grandchild> and a link to .

p: The appendix is synthetic review clutter: owner admin, reviewer nobody, date 2026-05-04, window 00:00-23:59, priority P0/P1/P2, and markers 0, 1, many. It intentionally repeats labels that real teams copy between pages.
Appendix prose includes escaped XML <appendix attr="value">, Cyrillic пример, inline appendixCheck(), and code literal /display/CX/Missing Appendix Literal.
